clusters.justification: These terms co-activate within the salience and limbic brain systems, representing the macroscopic functional domain of processing emotional valence, mood states, and physiological arousal.

This cluster maps deeply onto mesolimbic and ventromedial prefrontal circuitry, reflecting the overarching cognitive axis of reward processing, incentive motivation, and goal-directed decision-making.

Supported by the default mode network, this domain captures internally directed representational processes required to model one's own autobiographical identity as well as the subjective mental states of others.
